3053300.name: Dusty's Sweeping Cleanup
3053300.description:
Dusty’s Sweeping Cleanup is an action and racing inspired experience about cleaning your way around the house. Take control of Dusty the Robot Vacuum and trace your own path in a variety of fast paced and open environments.

This game was made in 15 weeks by a small group of students in Montréal, Canada.

Features:


  • Robot Movement: Boost, drift and jump with Dusty’s momentum-based movement.
  • Robot Cleaning: Earn points by cleaning the floor and by sucking up a variety of objects in your environment.
  • House-Based Levels: Clean your way through different rooms, each with their own unique layout and obstacles to overcome.
  • Breaking objects: Break objects to create even more stuff to clean up!
  • Collectibles: For the completionists, try to find all the special collectibles in each level.
  • Secrets: Find hidden passages scattered around the house, with many secrets waiting to be revealed.
